message:
fix(codegen): Register builtins module in import registry

Add missing 'builtins' module registration to fix "External module
'builtins' not found" warnings during codegen. The builtins module
is a core Python module that exposes built-in functions (len, abs,
max, etc.) as a module.

Test:
- import builtins; builtins.len([1,2,3]) -> works
- import builtins; builtins.abs(-5) -> works
- import builtins; builtins.max([1,5,3]) -> works

Fixes critical issue documented in .claude/CLAUDE.md
